name: Duffel_Travel_Planner
description: Provides intelligent flight search and booking capabilities via Duffel's travel API. Enables the Mind to search flights across 300+ airlines, compare pricing, browse seat maps, and manage bookings for comprehensive travel planning.
progressive_unlock: Flight search and offer comparison available immediately. Booking creation and seat selection unlock after Mind has successfully completed at least one search and viewed offer details.
constraints: WRITE-CAPABLE: Order creation charges real money — ALWAYS require explicit Steward confirmation with price breakdown before booking
Respect Duffel API rate limit as specified in response headers
Always validate IATA airport codes before creating offer requests
Never expose Duffel API token in logs, outputs, or error messages
Cache airline list in LTM with key 'duffel_airlines' (7-day TTL)
Cache offer request results in STREAM with 15-minute TTL (prices expire)
Present all prices with currency code and convert to user's preferred currency if possible
For multi-segment trips, clearly separate outbound and return legs in presentation
Track offer expiry times — warn user if viewing stale offers
Never cache passenger PII (names, documents) in LTM — STREAM only with session TTL

steps.instruction: Validate input against Layer 3 Tool Schema. Confirm IATA codes are 3 uppercase letters, dates are YYYY-MM-DD and in the future, passenger types are valid enums.
Retrieve Duffel API token from TENET.apiKey.duffel. Construct Authorization header as 'Bearer {token}'. Set Duffel-Version header to '2024-06-01'.
Determine query intent: flight search (find flights), offer details (deep dive on specific option), seat selection (browse seat map), booking (purchase tickets), or airline info (carrier lookup).
For flight search: execute Duffel_CreateOfferRequest with slices and passengers. Store offer_request_id in STREAM. Then execute Duffel_ListOffers sorted by total_amount.
For offer listing: execute Duffel_ListOffers with offer_request_id. Present top 5-10 options with airline, times, duration, stops, and price. Note offer expiry time.
For offer details: execute Duffel_GetOffer. Present full segment breakdown, baggage allowance, fare conditions, and price breakdown. Cache in STREAM.duffel_offer_{id}.
For seat selection: execute Duffel_GetSeatMap. Present available seats by row with type (window/middle/aisle), legroom, and extra cost. Cache in STREAM.
For booking: CRITICAL — present full price breakdown and passenger details to Steward. Wait for explicit confirmation. Execute Duffel_CreateOrder only after approval. Store booking reference.
For airline info: execute Duffel_ListAirlines. Cache full list in LTM. Present filtered results matching user query.
Compile travel results with clear formatting. Present times in departure/arrival timezone. Calculate total journey time. Highlight any long layovers (>3h).
Log operation in LTM with key 'duffel_op_{timestamp}' including intent, route, and booking reference if applicable.
